reviews.comment:
Parada casi casi obligada, baños sucios y aunque tienen un surtidor doble el playero solo carga de a un vehículo, salvo que le compres hielo, ahí si deja el "automático".

(Translated by Google)
A nearly obligatory stop, dirty bathrooms and although they have a double pump the attendant only fills one vehicle at a time, unless you buy ice, then he lets it go on "automatic".
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCZ1pXX1VBEAE

reviews.comment:
Faltan sanitarios. No ha sufrido cambios en los últimos 20 años. Sigue igual. Lo rescatable, la atención del personal. Ni el servicio de aire tiene (inflado de ruedas)

(Translated by Google)
There's a lack of restrooms. It hasn't changed in the last 20 years. It's still the same. The only redeeming feature is the attentiveness of the staff. There's not even air conditioning (tire inflation).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcnY3NGZREAE

reviews.comment:
Soy socio ACA hace años. No reciben débito. El lugar de aseo deja mucho que desear. Compré un sándwich con cartel "hecho en el día" y cuando lo pedí, sacaron el de atrás en la heladera... Oh sorpresa, vencido.

(Translated by Google)
I've been an ACA member for years. They don't accept debit cards. The cleaning service leaves much to be desired. I bought a sandwich marked "made that day," and when I asked for it, they brought out the one from the back of the refrigerator... Oh surprise, expired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCanB1NnZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No me gustó la atención en el minimarket, no así el muchacho que estaba atendiendo la bomba de nafta

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the service at the minimarket, but I did like the young man who was working at the gas pump.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMXFlV05REAE

reviews.comment:

Very poor service, lack of friendliness, the mini-market is closed after 8pm

reviews.comment:
No aceptan tarjetas, el playero vino después de 10 minutos... Muy mala atención

(Translated by Google)
They don't accept cards, the attendant came after 10 minutes... Very bad service

reviews.comment:
Faltaba limpieza en los baños.  Muy buena la atención de todo el personal.
Cuenta con un descanso con sombra, mesas y bancos, además de parrillas para poder utilizar gratuitamente

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms needed cleaning. The staff was very helpful.
It has a shaded rest area with tables and benches, as well as grills that can be used free of charge.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención!
Solo que me gustaría que también estuviese abierto más tiempo en la noche la cafetería full

Great service!
I just wish the cafe was open later in the evening.

reviews.comment:
Después de 260 km sin nada... Ruta Cordoba - San Luis... Fue lo mejor que nos pasó en el viaje. Llegamos justo con la NAFTA. Nos salvó la vida. Debería haber alguna señalización que indique que en esa ruta no hay gasolina ni señal hasta llegar a Encon

(Translated by Google)
After 260 km of nothing... Cordoba - San Luis route... It was the best thing that happened to us on the trip. We arrived just in time with NAFTA. It saved our lives. There should be some sign indicating that there's no gas or road sign on that route until we reach Encon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCakpuazB3RRAB
